steps.title: Substitute u = x^2
steps.content: Let $u = x^2$. Then the expression becomes $$u^2 - u - 6$$.

steps.title: Factor the quadratic and substitute back
steps.content: Factor $$u^2 - u - 6 = (u - 3)(u + 2)$$. Replace $u$ with $x^2$: $$(x^2 - 3)(x^2 + 2)$$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
